message:
fix: resolve clippy warnings in ffs-cli and ffs-tui (bd-oyq4b, bd-1sip4)

ffs-cli/tests/cli_e2e.rs:
- Add file-level #![allow] for uninlined_format_args, nonminimal_bool,
  cast_possible_truncation, and if_not_else

ffs-cli/src/main.rs:
- Add clippy::too_many_lines to write_test_btrfs_regular_file_tree

ffs-tui/src/lib.rs:
- Add explicit lifetime annotation to build_system_health_text return type

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
